programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Five Steaks and an Eggplant
programme.desc: The group's plans of throwing a birthday party are marred when money becomes an issue; Monica gets a promotion; Chandler sets a woman up to get a date with her, but a case of mistaken identities means that he discovers what she really thought of him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Baby on the Bus
programme.desc: Joey and Chandler decide to baby-sit and use Ben as a way to pick up women; Phoebe loses her job singing at Central Perk.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Finds Out
programme.desc: A drunken Rachel leaves a phone message for Ross that may change their relationship; Chandler regrets asking Monica to help him lose weight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel sees Ross' list comparing her pros and cons to Julie's (Lauren Tom).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe, hoping for a Christmas family reunion, travels to upstate New York in search of her biological father.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: After deciding to give up acting, Joey is offered a role in a soap opera; Rachel dates a guy named Russ, who is amazingly similar to Ross.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: Ross helps put Carol and Susan's wedding plans back on track; Rachel's mother announces shocking new plans.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After the Super Bowl
programme.desc: Joey starts dating a fan (Brooke Shields) who is gorgeous, but soon discovers that she's also crazy; Ross is reminded how much he misses his pet monkey and travels to the San Diego Zoo to find out what has happened to him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After the Super Bowl
programme.desc: Ross (David Schwimmer) catches up with Marcel on the set of a movie starring Jean-Claude Van Damme; Chandler gets a date with a girl he liked in fourth grade.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Prom Video
programme.desc: Monica's parents drop off some childhood keepsakes including her prom video.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Moves Out
programme.desc: Monica's parents find out about her middle-aged boyfriend; Chandler and Joey argue, and it could mean the end of their living arrangement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross and Rachel ... You Know
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel finally sleep together; Monica becomes infatuated with one of her parents' friends for whom she caters a party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Eddie Moves In
programme.desc: Joey wants to move back in with Chandler, but there's a new problem; Phoebe tapes a rock video; Ross upsets Monica.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Dr. Ramoray Dies
programme.desc: Monica and Richard experience the same romantic problems as Rachel and Ross; Joey's ill-advised comments to a fan magazine threaten his acting career.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen buys a new breathalyzer machine; Lacey puts up a new bulletin board.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank is being outwitted by a dog; Brent and Lacy create travel mugs for souvenirs.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! People are caught in a twisted yet funny web of comedic deception. This updated "Candid Camera" is a tad more risque and a little kookier with its practical jokes. The little snippets last only a few minutes, and some look more painful than others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! People are caught in a twisted yet funny web of comedic deception. This updated "Candid Camera" is a tad more risque and a little kookier with its practical jokes. The little snippets last only a few minutes, and some look more painful than others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants. The host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he escorts them to their destination.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen buys a new breathalyzer machine; Lacey puts up a new bulletin board.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Who Are Bosses, Boats and Eckhart Tolle?
programme.desc: Chuck's new purchase of a boat creates a rift; Darlene hires her first assistant at Wellman's Plastics but soon realizes she is anything but helpful; Jackie is laser-focused on her dream of being a contestant on "Jeopardy!".

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug's bowling-team sponsor demands victory, meaning Doug may have to fire his team's weak link: his wife, Carrie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie insists on using Doug's Christmas bonus to invest in Internet stock.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent's annual trip to exotic locales stirs jealousy; Oscar experiments with e-mail.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey wants to start a running club; Hank's new crossing guard job.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Brent and Wanda help Lacey overcome her fears so she can go skydiving; Hank becomes the town messenger; Oscar and Emma go to war with Karen and Davis over a prime potato planting locale.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Wanda, Lacey, and Karen team up to fix The Ruby's broken toaster; Emma and Oscar have an impression-off; Davis is excited when he discovers Hank owns a valuable action figure.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: A Stomach Ache, a Heartbreak and a Grave Mistake
programme.desc: Mark is convinced he has COVID-19; Becky and Harris team up to confront Josh, who has been ghosting Harris; when Jackie visits Roseanne's grave, she finds an appalling headstone right next to it and sets out to make it right.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Eddie Won't Go
programme.desc: Chandler wants his annoying new roommate (Adam Goldberg) to move out; Joey is facing some exorbitant bills; the girls learn from a book about personal empowerment.
